info.title: Native Mobile Build API
info.description: API for building and managing native mobile applications.

servers.description: Replace ODC_PORTAL_DOMAIN with the domain of your organization.
Replace {odc-portal-domain} with the domain of your organization.

get.summary: Returns the details for a given build operation
get.description:
The build operation key is generated when the build operation is created and returned in the response of the create API.

It can also be obtained through the list API.

Rate Limit: 100 requests per minute

API Client needs the **Stage > View stage** permission.

200.description: The details of the build operation.

401.description: Not authorized to perform the requested operation.

403.description: Insufficient permissions to perform the requested operation.

404.description: The specified environment, application or build operation was not found.

429.description:
Too many requests. The rate limit for the API has been exceeded. 
Rate Limit: 100 requests per minute

get.x-os-permissions: API Client needs the **Stage > View stage** permission.

get.summary: Returns the progress messages for a given native build
get.description:
Progress messages provide step-by-step status updates on the build process. Supports pagination via limit and offset parameters.

Rate Limit: 100 requests per minute

API Client needs the **Stage > View stage** permission.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the last page, to get the following page with the same filters applied.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max number of elements that should be returned in a single page.

200.description: The list of progress messages for the native build operation.

401.description: Not authorized to perform the requested operation.

403.description: Insufficient permissions to perform the requested operation.

404.description: The specified environment, application or build operation was not found.

429.description:
Too many requests. The rate limit for the API has been exceeded. 
Rate Limit: 100 requests per minute

get.x-os-permissions: API Client needs the **Stage > View stage** permission.

get.summary: Lists all build operations for filtering criteria
get.description:
Results can optionally be filtered by build status, platform, or revision. Supports pagination via limit and offset parameters.

Rate Limit: 100 requests per minute

API Client needs the **Stage > View stage** permission.

parameters.name: mobilePlatform
parameters.description: Filter by mobile platform type, if filled.

parameters.name: revision
parameters.description: Filter by revision number, if filled.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status of the build, if filled.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the last page, to get the following page with the same filters applied.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max number of elements that should be returned in a single page.

200.description: The list of build operations matching the filtering criteria.

401.description: Not authorized to perform the requested operation.

403.description: Insufficient permissions to perform the requested operation.

429.description:
Too many requests. The rate limit for the API has been exceeded. 
Rate Limit: 100 requests per minute

get.x-os-permissions: API Client needs the **Stage > View stage** permission.

post.description:
This is an asynchronous operation. The response contains the details of the created build operation, including its
generated key, which can be used to query the operation status and details through other APIs.

Rate Limit: 5 requests per minute

API Client needs the **Release management > Deploy apps** permission.

requestBody.description: Details of the build operation request

201.description: The native build operation was created successfully. The response contains the details of the created build operation.

401.description: Not authorized to perform the requested operation.

403.description: Insufficient permissions to perform the requested operation.

404.description: The specified environment or application was not found.

429.description:
Too many requests. The rate limit for the API has been exceeded. 
Rate Limit: 100 requests per minute

post.x-os-permissions: API Client needs the **Release management > Deploy apps** permission.

post.summary: Returns the suggested versions of the next build for the request platform(s)
post.description:
Provides both the version number and version code for the next build. If no platform is specified, suggestions are returned for both iOS and Android.

Rate Limit: 5 requests per minute

API Client needs the **Stage > View stage** permission.

requestBody.description: Details of the version suggestion request. See OutSystems.NativeApplicationOrchestration.Contracts.V1.Models.Public.VersionSuggestionsRequest

200.description: The suggested version number and version code of the next native build for the given environment key, application key and platform.

401.description: Not authorized to perform the requested operation.

403.description: Insufficient permissions to perform the requested operation.

404.description: The specified environment or application was not found.

429.description:
Too many requests. The rate limit for the API has been exceeded. 
Rate Limit: 5 requests per minute

post.x-os-permissions: API Client needs the **Stage > View stage** permission.

post.summary: Check if a new native build is needed for one or all platforms
post.description:
Results indicate whether the current build artifacts are up to date or if a rebuild is required. If no platform is specified, validation is performed for both iOS and Android.

Rate Limit: 5 requests per minute

API Client needs the **Stage > View stage** permission.

requestBody.description: Details of the native build validation request

schema.description: Native build validation request for public API
Native build validation request for public API

200.description: The validation results for the given build key, revision and platform.

401.description: Not authorized to perform the requested operation.

403.description: Insufficient permissions to perform the requested operation.

404.description: The specified environment or application was not found.

429.description:
Too many requests. The rate limit for the API has been exceeded. 
Rate Limit: 5 requests per minute

post.x-os-permissions: API Client needs the **Stage > View stage** permission.

get.summary: Returns the deployed platform-specific native configuration for a given Android application
get.description:
The response includes all the necessary information to build and deploy an Android native mobile application,
such as keystore files and other related configurations.

Rate Limit: 100 requests per minute

API Client needs the **Configuration management > View configurations** permission.

401.description: Not authorized to perform the requested operation.

404.description: The specified environment or application does not exist, or there is no mobile configuration deployed for the specified application.

429.description:
Too Many Requests. The rate limit for viewing mobile configurations has been exceeded. 
Rate Limit: 100 requests per minute

get.x-os-permissions: API Client needs the **Configuration management > View configurations** permission.

patch.summary: Updates the Native Mobile Configuration for Android Applications
patch.description:
Allows modifying keystore files and other related settings required for building and deploying the application.
Only the fields provided in the request body are updated; omitted fields remain unchanged.

Rate Limit: 10 requests per minute

API Client needs the **Configuration management > Edit configurations** permission.

schema.description: Result payload model for native Android Build configurations
Result payload model for native Android Build configurations

401.description: Not authorized to perform the requested operation.

404.description: The specified environment or application does not exist, or there is no mobile configuration deployed for the specified application.

429.description:
Too Many Requests. The rate limit for editing mobile configurations has been exceeded. 
Rate Limit: 10 requests per minute

patch.x-os-permissions: API Client needs the **Configuration management > Edit configurations** permission.

get.summary: Returns the deployed native configuration for a given iOS application
get.description:
The response includes all the necessary information to build and deploy an iOS native mobile application,
such as certificates, provisioning profiles, and other related configurations.

Rate Limit: 100 requests per minute

API Client needs the **Configuration management > View configurations** permission.

401.description: Not authorized to perform the requested operation.

404.description: The specified environment or application does not exist, or there is no mobile configuration deployed for the specified application.

429.description:
Too Many Requests. The rate limit for viewing mobile configurations has been exceeded. 
Rate Limit: 100 requests per minute

get.x-os-permissions: API Client needs the **Configuration management > View configurations** permission.

patch.summary: Updates the Native Mobile Configuration for iOS Applications
patch.description:
Allows modifying certificates, provisioning profiles, and other related settings required for building and deploying the application.
Only the fields provided in the request body are updated; omitted fields remain unchanged.

Rate Limit: 10 requests per minute

API Client needs the **Configuration management > Edit configurations** permission.

schema.description: Request payload model for native IOS Build configurations
Request payload model for native IOS Build configurations

401.description: Not authorized to perform the requested operation.

404.description: The specified environment or application does not exist, or there is no mobile configuration deployed for the specified application.

429.description:
Too Many Requests. The rate limit for editing mobile configurations has been exceeded. 
Rate Limit: 10 requests per minute

patch.x-os-permissions: API Client needs the **Configuration management > Edit configurations** permission.

get.summary: Returns the list of possible native builder versions
get.description:
Rate Limit: 100 requests per minute per tenant

API client must have at least one permission.
get.x-os-permissions: API client must have at least one permission.

get.summary: Gets extensibility settings for the given application.
get.description:
Rate Limit: 100 requests per minute per tenant

API Client needs the **Configuration management > View configurations** permission.
get.x-os-permissions: API Client needs the **Configuration management > View configurations** permission.

patch.summary: Patches extensibility settings for a given application
patch.description:
Rate Limit: 10 requests per minute per tenant

API Client needs the **Configuration management > Edit configurations** permission.

schema.description:
Extensibility Setting model for request to NAOS.10 PatchExtensibilitySettings endpoint
Refer to [HLD](https://outsystemsrd.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/RDSD/pages/4224516209/Solution+Enabler+-+Mobile+High+Level+Design#NAOS-API) for example payload

Refer to [HLD](https://outsystemsrd.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/RDSD/pages/4224516209/Solution+Enabler+-+Mobile+High+Level+Design#NAOS-API) for example payload

value.description: Value to be set for the configuration

type.description: A URI reference that identifies the problem type.

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem.

status.description: The HTTP status code applicable to the problem.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation of the error.

instance.description: A URI that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem.

traceId.description: This field helps OutSystems support track and investigate specific error occurrences. Providing this identifier when reporting an issue allows for more precise and faster troubleshooting.

errorCode.description: This error code serves the purpose to communicate with OutSystems Support and help diagnose errors.

ProblemDetails.description: A standardized error response as per RFC 7807 (Problem Details for HTTP APIs).
